info.title: Airtable Web API
info.description: Airtable is a cloud collaboration service that combines database and spreadsheet features. The Web API provides RESTful endpoints for managing bases, tables, records, fields, views, webhooks, comments, and user information.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of records from the specified table.

post.description: Creates up to 10 records in a single request.

patch.description: Updates specified fields of up to 10 records. Unspecified fields are preserved.

put.description: Replaces up to 10 records. Unspecified fields are cleared.

delete.description: Deletes up to 10 records by their IDs.

get.description: Retrieves a single record by ID.

patch.description: Updates specified fields of a single record.

put.description: Replaces a single record. Unspecified fields are cleared.

delete.description: Deletes a single record by ID.

post.description: Adds a comment to a record.

get.description: Returns all bases the API key can access.

post.description: Creates a new base in a workspace.

get.description: Returns table, field, and view metadata for a base.

post.description: Creates a new table in a base.
Creates a new field (column) in a table.

patch.description: Updates field name, description, or options.

get.description: Returns all views across all tables in a base.
Returns all webhooks for a base.

post.description: Creates a new webhook for a base.

patch.description: Enables/disables notifications or updates notification URL.

get.description: Returns payloads for a webhook starting from a cursor.

post.description: Extends the life of a webhook.

get.description: Returns info about the authenticated user/token.
Lists all users in an enterprise account.
Lists all groups in an enterprise account.
Gets details about a specific enterprise user.

BearerAuth.description: Personal access token or OAuth access token
